hero.title: Knowing who you are changes everything.
hero.subtitle: Nello One is a guided self-knowledge journey in 7 steps, created to help you understand your patterns, choices and paths with more clarity.
hero.description: One test at a time. No rush. With depth.
hero.tagline: Takes just a few minutes to start.
hero.verse: "Search me, O God, and know my heart."

mirror.title: Maybe you are here because you feel this:
items: You feel like you repeat patterns and don't understand why
You've taken personality tests, but everything seems shallow
You have potential, but lack clarity
You want to know yourself better, without labels
mirror.closing: Nello One doesn't offer ready answers. It offers a path.
mirror.verse: "Let us examine our ways and test them, and let us return to the Lord."

improvements.title: What you will discover
improvements.closing: Clarity doesn't change who you are. It changes what you do with who you are.

problems.title: Problems NELLO ONE Solves
problems.subtitle: Self-knowledge is powerful, but it's confusing when you don't know where to start.
problems.description: NELLO ONE brings clarity, structure and direction by solving the problems that most people face when trying to understand themselves.
problems: Feeling lost about your direction, purpose or identity
Struggling with emotional patterns you can't explain
Difficulty making decisions or staying consistent
Communication issues in relationships and work
Lack of focus, discipline or clarity
Repeating the same mistakes without understanding why
Knowing your strengths but not knowing how to use them
Starting a transformation journey but getting stuck along the way
problems.closing: With NELLO ONE, you finally understand who you are, why you act the way you do and how to change what no longer helps you.

miguel.title: You don't walk alone.
miguel.subtitle: Your Inner Guide
miguel.description: Throughout the journey, Nello accompanies you. He helps interpret your results, connect patterns and open space for more inner clarity.
miguel.quote: My role is to help you see more clearly.
miguel.note: Nello doesn't judge, doesn't label and doesn't decide for you. He just helps you notice.
miguel.verse: "Above all else, guard your heart, for everything you do flows from it."

why_matters.title: How NELLO ONE Helps You Improve
why_matters.subtitle: NELLO ONE doesn't just deliver results — it reveals practical paths for personal growth.
why_matters.description: Each test highlights your strengths and shows where you can evolve, always with clarity and objectivity.
improvements: Which emotional patterns are sabotaging your daily life
Where your communication breaks down and how to improve

In which areas your energy is scattered
What direction to follow for more clarity, balance and purpose
why_matters.closing: All of this with AI guidance and a unique map that translates your personality, talents and challenges — for you to use in real life.

value_proposition.title: Why Choose NELLO ONE?
value_proposition.subtitle: The world's smartest self-knowledge system powered by AI
value_proposition.intro: Most people know parts of themselves. Very few know the whole picture.
value_proposition.description: NELLO ONE was created to solve exactly this. Instead of doing isolated personality tests without context, NELLO ONE combines 7 internationally validated assessments and integrates all results into a single AI-generated Personal Map.
value_proposition.benefits_title: What does this help you improve?
benefits: Blind spots that hold you back
How to make decisions with confidence
How to grow personally, professionally and spiritually
value_proposition.includes_title: What you get with the Full Journey
includes: Lifetime access to your profile and insights
value_proposition.closing: And the most important part: You finally understand yourself with clarity, depth and direction.

growth.results_title: What you can improve right now
growth.results_subtitle: Based on your patterns, these are your immediate growth points.
growth.main_growth_point: Your biggest growth point right now

final_result.title: When you reach the end
final_result.description: After completing all stages, you receive the Essence Code. A clear synthesis of your moment, integrating your journey and pointing paths of growth.
final_result.note: It's not a report. It's not a label. It's an invitation to clarity.

inspiration.title: Our inspiration
inspiration.description: Nello One is born inspired by the biblical call to examine the heart and seek a life with more truth and meaning.
inspiration.text: We believe that self-knowledge is not an end in itself, but a path to live with more love, responsibility and openness to God's purpose.

items.question: How do I know if this works for me?
items.answer: Nello One was created for anyone who wants emotional clarity and self-knowledge. If you want to understand your patterns and improve your choices, it will work for you.

items.question: Do I need to understand psychology?
items.answer: No. The system translates everything simply, in clear and practical language.

items.question: How is Nello One different from other tests?
items.answer: It combines 7 different methodologies and integrates all results into a unique map. The result is a complete vision that shows who you are, not just an isolated label.

items.question: How long does it take to complete?
items.answer: Each test takes 5 to 15 minutes. You can do it at your own pace, one per day or all at once.

items.question: What is the Essence Code?
items.answer: It's the final report that integrates all your results. It shows your patterns, strengths and paths of growth in a clear synthesis.

what_is.title: What is NELLO ONE?
what_is.description: NELLO ONE is an intelligent self-discovery platform that combines scientifically grounded personality tests, emotional design and AI-guided insights to reveal who you are and how you function — with clarity and simplicity.

tests.title: The 7 Professional Tests
tests.description: Accurate, professional tests translated into a simple and intuitive visual experience.

map.title: Your Self-Map, All in One Place
map.description: An integrated visual map that combines all your results into a simple, deep, meaningful overview.
map.coming_soon: Coming soon to the NELLO ONE experience.

clarity.title: Clarity
clarity.description: See yourself with simple, objective explanations.

simplicity.closing: The value is in the journey. Not just the result.
